title: Hub Dispatch Orchestration (Completed)
summary: Stabilized the local runner environment (GID 986, socket mount). Implemented multi-arch Docker builds (linux/amd64, linux/arm64) using Buildx and QEMU. Configured GitHub Actions caching (type=gha) for optimized build speeds. Consolidated manifest definitions into manifest.yaml, removed thirdparty.yaml, and implemented unique project builds via jq in the build-engine.
